title: unobtainable Item crafting reciptes
description: You Can craft Bedrock, barrier, command blocks, light block, and more!* *more infomation in description.
body:
You ever wanted unobtainable Items in Minecraft like bedrock 

Then this mod is the best for you

in this mod you can craft 

-bedrock,barrier,structure void,end potal frame

-spawner,commandblock,repeating commandblock, chain commandblock

-light block,player head, reinforced deepslate*



*bedrock has a very complicated crafting recipte.

You can use this mod to prank your friends, just build in survival with bedrock on your singleplayer world,

or use it for other thing it´s your decision.
